properties.video_scaling: Video scales to fill available area
properties.audio_routing: Audio routes to appropriate output device
properties.input_handling: Input events handled differently per state

rules: Priority Order: Fullscreen > Cinema > PiP > Cast > Normal
User Preference: User can override priority order
Hardware Limitation: Some transitions blocked by hardware
Performance: High-resolution video may block PiP transition
Network: Cast mode requires network connection
Battery: PiP mode may be blocked on low battery
Animation: Smooth transition animations between states
Input Block: Block input during transition
Audio Fade: Fade audio during transition
Video Scaling: Scale video during transition
State Persistence: Save state before transition
Error Recovery: Recover to previous state on failure

cursor_handling: Auto Hide: Cursor hides after 3 seconds of inactivity
Show on Movement: Cursor shows on mouse movement
Custom Cursor: Cinema mode uses custom cursor
Cursor Size: Cursor scales with DPI
Cursor Opacity: Cursor fades out instead of hiding
subtitle_safe_area: Position: Subtitles positioned in safe area
Scaling: Subtitles scale with screen size

rules: Position Continuity: Playback position preserved across state changes
State Continuity: Play/pause state preserved across state changes
Audio Continuity: Volume and audio track preserved
Subtitle Continuity: Subtitle visibility preserved
Video Continuity: Video track preserved
Network Continuity: Network connection preserved in Cast mode
discontinuity_handling: Forced Discontinuity: Some state changes force discontinuity
User Choice: User can choose to maintain or reset continuity
Performance: High-resolution video may cause discontinuity
Network: Network issues may cause discontinuity in Cast mode

rules: Primary Monitor: Cinema mode defaults to primary monitor
Secondary Monitor: Optional extended Cinema on secondary monitor
Monitor Switching: User can switch Cinema to different monitor
Monitor Arrangement: Support for horizontal/vertical/diagonal arrangements
DPI Scaling: Cinema scales correctly across monitors
features: Extended Cinema: Video on primary, controls on secondary
Picture-in-Picture: Video on primary, PiP on secondary
Cast Display: Video on external display, controls on primary
Monitor Profiles: Save monitor configurations per user
Auto Switch: Auto-switch to Cinema monitor when entering Cinema

rules: Video Scaling: Video maintains aspect ratio with DPI
UI Scaling: UI elements scale with DPI
Subtitle Scaling: Subtitles scale with DPI
OSD Scaling: OSD scales with DPI
Cursor Scaling: Cursor scales with DPI
Safe Area Scaling: Safe areas scale with DPI
dpi_transitions: Monitor Change: DPI changes when moving Cinema to different monitor
System Change: DPI changes when system DPI changes
Application Change: DPI changes when application DPI changes
Manual Change: User manually changes DPI settings
Auto Adapt: Cinema adapts to DPI changes automatically

rules: Active Playback: Inhibit sleep during active playback
Paused Playback: Inhibit sleep for 5 minutes after pause
Cinema Mode: Inhibit sleep during Cinema mode
Cast Mode: Inhibit sleep during Cast mode
PiP Mode: Inhibit sleep during PiP mode
User Preference: User can override sleep inhibit
power_management: Battery Mode: Different sleep rules on battery
Plugged In: Different sleep rules when plugged in
Power Profile: Respect system power profile
User Override: User can override power management
Auto Resume: Auto-resume sleep inhibit when needed

recovery: Automatic Recovery: Some errors auto-recover to Normal mode
User Notification: Errors shown to user with recovery options
Fallback: If Cinema fails, fallback to Normal mode
Logging: All errors logged for diagnostics
Retry: Transient errors can be retried automatically

cinema_privacy_rules: Window Titles: No sensitive information in Cinema window title
File Paths: Redact file paths in Cinema UI
Network URLs: Redact network URLs in Cinema UI
User Data: No user data in Cinema window properties
Diagnostics: Redact sensitive info in Cinema diagnostics
cinema_redaction_controls: Cinema Screenshot: User can disable Cinema screenshots
Cinema Recording: User can disable Cinema recording
Cinema Sharing: User can disable Cinema sharing
Cinema Overlay: User can disable Cinema overlay content
Cinema Metadata: Redact metadata in Cinema window

gate_integration: PFFG-001: Foundation Final Gate Reader checks Cinema foundation definitions
PMX-001: Provider Runtime Matrix includes Cinema foundation support
